patterns.command_pattern: Commands are defined in the Command enum in main.rs, with variants that may have fields for arguments. Some commands have subcommands using nested enums (e.g., FactoryAction, IconsAction).
patterns.command_dispatch: Main function matches on cli.cmd and dispatches to module functions. Simple commands can be inlined, complex ones are in separate modules.
patterns.launchd_pattern: factory.rs shows the pattern: generate_plist() creates XML string, write to ~/Library/LaunchAgents/, use launchctl load/unload. WatchPaths triggers on filesystem changes.
patterns.platform_detection: Use cfg!(target_os = "macos") for compile-time or std::env::consts::OS for runtime platform detection
patterns.error_handling: Functions return anyhow::Result<()>, using .context() for error messages

existing_implementations.description: Factory command already handles launchd installation for dispatcher and merge-gate, but uses the OLD polling approach (KeepAlive=true). This spec creates a NEW event-driven approach (WatchPaths + --once + KeepAlive=false).
existing_implementations.key_differences: OLD: KeepAlive=true with --poll-ms (daemon always running). NEW: WatchPaths with --once + KeepAlive=false (process exits, OS re-triggers on fs events).

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion_2: Card in .cards/done/ triggers merge-gate automatically within 2s
acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion_3: No bop merge-gate --loop process needed (event-driven, not polling)
